1133.issue: [W1133] [io-package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.lowpass-filter/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "info.subscribedStatesCount" role "indicator" expects common.type to be one of [boolean], but found "number"

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 2.6.1 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.lowpass-filter/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
